hotels.name: Fujikawaguchiko Onsen Konanso
hotels.description_fr:
Offrant une vue imprenable sur le mont Fuji et le lac Kawaguchi, le Fujikawaguchiko Onsen Konanso propose des bains de source chaude naturelle et de grandes chambres de style japonais avec un sol traditionnel en tatami (paille tressÃ©e). hotels.description_en:
Featuring great views of Mount Fuji and Lake Kawaguchi, Konanso boasts natural hot spring baths and large Japanese-style rooms with traditional tatami (woven-straw) flooring. It is only a 2-minute walk from a ferry stop, where guests can board sightseeing cruises. Free WiFi is offered in all areas.
Konanso offers indoor and outdoor hot spring baths, a private-use bath (charges apply), and a foot bath on the rooftop. Relaxing massage services can be arranged. Other facilities include karaoke rooms and a lounge bar. A souvenir shop can be found on the ground floor.
Guest rooms at Konanso are fitted with futon bedding, a seating area and a flat-screen TV. A Fridge and an electric kettle are also provided.

Goditi un servizio di prima classe presso Fujikawaguchiko Onsen Konanso

Con una splendida vista sul Monte Fuji e sul Lago Kawaguchi, il Fujikawaguchiko Onsen Konanso offre ampie camere in stile giapponese con pavimenti in tatami (paglia intrecciata) tradizionali. Dista solo 2 minuti a piedi dalla fermata del traghetto, da cui gli ospiti possono imbarcarsi per crociere turistiche. Tutte le aree sono coperte dal WiFi gratuito.
